thread.title: 2 Hinsdale D86 Candidates Join Forces

author: David Giuliani
title: 2 Hinsdale D86 Candidates Join Forces
text:
[Politics & Government](/illinois/hinsdale/politics)
2 Hinsdale D86 Candidates Join Forces
Both serve on area elementary school boards. They are facing six other candidates.
HINSDALE, IL – Two candidates for the Hinsdale High School District 86 board are running as a team called Unite 86 in the April 1 election.
The hopefuls are [Liz Mitha](https://patch.com/illinois/hinsdale/hinsdale-d86-critic-running-board) of Darien and [Mary Satchwell](https://patch.com/illinois/hinsdale/maercker-official-runs-hinsdale-d86-board) of Hinsdale.
Along with six other candidates, they are vying for the four four-year board seats. The others are incumbent Terri Walker, Warren Ali, Andrew Catton, Bobby Fischer, Jenny Gannon and Baron Leacock.
Find out what's happening in Hinsdale-Clarendon Hillswith free, real-time updates from Patch.
Incumbent [Jeff Waters](https://patch.com/illinois/hinsdale/hinsdale-d86s-waters-running-again) is the lone candidate for the two-year seat.
In a news release this week, Mitha and Satchwell said they are focused on data-driven decision-making, fiscal responsibility, transparency and collaboration.
Find out what's happening in Hinsdale-Clarendon Hillswith free, real-time updates from Patch.
Both are elementary school board members – Mitha at Cass District 63 and Satchwell at Maercker District 60.
They have [formed a website for their campaigns](https://www.unite86.com/).
